About EDRA

SHAPING INDONESIA'SARCHITECTURALLANDSCAPE

Since 1999, PT. EDRA Arsitek Indonesia has been at the forefront of architectural innovation, delivering projects that define spaces and inspire communities.

Our Services

Architecture

Full range of architectural services including design, technical consultancy, interior design, and conservation services.

Management

Project management for residential, commercial and public facilities with full service from concept to completion.

Construction

Strong construction project management with outstanding implementation and flawless delivery on time and budget.
